From: billing@atlasresearch.com
To: Antony Lovrich <ap@cordisclinical.com>
Date: 2025-12-15
Subject: RE: Chart Review INV-302

Confirming receipt of the $19,517.20 wire on 12/12 covering the pre-screen chart review and the eDiary completion invoice. Note our chart review billed 64 subjects; the amendment caps reimbursable chart review at $3,000.
